err_no_branch: Xisaabtaada laan lama qoondeynin. Waydii maareeye inuu laantaada dejiyo ka hor inta aadan shift furin.
err_network_retry: Khalad shabakadeed — hubi xiriirkaaga oo isku day mar kale.
err_cash_variance: Farqi lacageed oo {symbol}{amount} ah ayaa jira — fadlan mar kale tiri, ka dibna maareeyuhu waa dhinac ka kaa yimaadaa.
err_photo_type: Isticmaal sawir JPEG, PNG, WebP ama HEIC ah.
err_photo_too_big: Sawirku wuxuu ka weyn yahay 10 MB — mar kale ka qaad heer hoose.
err_photo_too_big_processed: Sawirku wuu ka weynaa ka dib habaynta — mar kale ka qaad heer hoose.
err_photo_process: Sawirkaas lama habayn karin — isku day mar kale.
err_id_read: Aqoonsiga lama akhrin karin — gacanta ku qor.
err_id_no_number: Lambar kama akhrin karin sawirkaas — isku day mar kale ama gacanta ku qor.
id_low_confidence: ⚠️ Hubaal yar ayaa lagu akhriyay — fadlan hubi inuu waafaqsan yahay aqoonsiga.
id_captured: ✓ Aqoonsiga waa la qaaday — fadlan hubi inuu waafaqsan yahay.
err_id_timeout: Sikaanka aqoonsiga wuu dhaafay wakhtigii — gacanta ku qor.
err_id_failed: Sikaanka aqoonsiga wuu fashilmay — gacanta ku qor.
err_consent_required: Dirsadaha waa inuu ku raacaa ogolaanshaha habaynta xogta ka hor inta aadan xirmada diiwaangelin.
err_photo_upload_failed: Soo geynta sawirka way fashilantay — mar kale qaad ama sawirka ka bood.
err_photo_upload_timeout: Soo geynta sawirka wakhtigeedii ayay dhaaftay — hubi xiriirkaaga oo isku day mar kale.
err_photo_upload_network: Soo geynta sawirka way fashilantay — hubi xiriirkaaga.
err_submit_timeout: Wakhtigii ayaa dhaafay — xirmada laga yaabaa inaan la diiwaangelin. Hubi safka dirista ka hor inta aadan mar kale isku dayin.
err_submit_network: Khalad shabakadeed — xirmada lama diiwaangelin. Isku day mar kale.
shift_subtitle: {name} · Shiftkaaga furo si aad u bilowdo
shift_intro: Tiri lacagtaada caddaanka bilowga ka hor inta aadan xirmooyin aqbalin.
done_write_note: ✍️ Hadda lambarkan ku qor xirmada. Wax-qaadayaasha, darawalada iyo maareeyayaashu kamaradooda ayay ku sikaan doonaan.
done_receipt_consent: 📲 Dirsadaha wuu ogolaaday rasiid WhatsApp/SMS ah iyo cusboonaysiinta la-socodka.
sender_id_hint: Kaliya soo ururi haddii laantaadu u baahan tahay aqoonsiga dirsadaha. Waa la keydiyaa si aamin ah oo waxaa loo isticmaalaa kaliya shixnadan.
recv_id_hint: Waa la hubiyaa marka qaadanuhu xirmada qaato.
no_routes_notice: 🚧 Wali wado gaarsiin oo laga bilaabo laantaada lama dejin. Waydii maareeyahaaga inuu wado ku daro (Daashboodhka Laanta → Wadooyinka), ama isticmaal Albaab ilaa Albaab.
destination_hint: Wadooyinka iyo qiimaha waxaa dejiya maareeyahaaga.
description_placeholder: tusaale Dhar, alaab elektaroonig ah, dukumeenti
parcel_size_hint: S=sanduuqa kabaha · M=boorsada dhabarka · L=shandada · XL=paalad
shipping_fee_hint_auto: Si toos ah wadada ayaa loo qiimeeyay — waad beddeli kartaa.
shipping_fee_hint_manual: Qiimaha wadada ee maareeyaha ayaa si caadi ah la isticmaalaa — waad beddeli kartaa.
photo_intro: Sawir cad ka qaad xirmada la xidhay. Kani waa caddaynta helitaankaaga.
photo_tap_open_camera: Taabo si aad kamaradda u furto
photo_formats: JPEG/PNG/WebP/HEIC · si toos ah loo yareeyaa
confirm_intro: Dib u eeg, ogolaanshaha qaad, ka dibna xirmada diiwaangeli.
consent_data_text: Dirsadaha wuu ogolaaday in AskBiz uu kaydin karo oo habayn karo faahfaahintan (oo ay ku jiraan lambarka aqoonsiga iyo sawirka) si loo qaado oo loo gaarsiiyo xirmadan. Xogta waxaa loo hayaa kaliya intii loo baahnaa shixnadka iyo diiwaanada sharciga, waana la tirtiri karaa haddii la codsado.
consent_receipt_text: Dirsadaha wuxuu doonayaa rasiid WhatsApp/SMS ah iyo cusboonaysiinta la-socodka lambarkan {phone}.
close_intro: Tiri lacagtaada oo geli wadarta drawer-ka.
done_pending_sync_note: Waxaa lagu kaydiyay qalabkan — si toos ah ayay u soo shubmi doontaa marka aad internetka ku soo noqoto.
